sentence: Please submit the form ____ Friday.
All employees must ____ their badges at all times.
ko: 모든 직원은 항상 배지를 착용해야 합니다.
explain: must + 동사원형. at all times = 항상.

sentence: Please find the revised file ____ to this email.
ko: 이 이메일에 첨부된 수정 파일을 확인해 주세요.
explain: file attached to ~ : ~에 첨부된 파일. revised = 수정된.

sentence: The shipment ____ arrive by noon, according to the tracking system.
ko: 추적 시스템에 따르면 배송은 정오까지 도착할 것입니다.
explain: 근거 기반 강한 추정 must. according to = ~에 따르면.

sentence: If you have any questions, please contact ____ immediately.
ko: 질문이 있으면 즉시 저희에게 연락해 주세요.

sentence: Dear staff, This is to inform you that our customer support team will be relocated next month. Starting from May 3, the team will move from the 5th floor to the 9th floor of the same building. The new office will have a larger meeting room and upgraded computer equipment. Please make sure to pack all personal belongings by April 28. IT staff will assist you with moving your desktop computers on April 30. If you need temporary storage boxes, please contact Ms. Rivera in the HR department. We appreciate your cooperation during this transition period.

IT staff will assist you with moving your desktop computers on April 30. If you need temporary storage boxes, please contact Ms. Rivera in the HR department. We appreciate your cooperation during this transition period.
